title: experiment.json
description: State machine for one experiment (the atomic unit of inquiry). Analog of order-66 spec.json. Only `version` and `rigor_tier` are universally required; everything else accretes per tier.

version.description: Schema/state version, bumped on each lifecycle transition.

status.description: Lifecycle state. proposed→registered (after /register)→running (during /execute)→audited (verifier ran)→complete (PROMOTE + brief/paper) | retracted (confound-audit failed) | abandoned.

rigor_tier.description: The load-bearing enum. Missing/unknown ⇒ treat as publication (RULE-0) and flag.

hash.description: Immutable content hash (e.g. sha256 or dvc md5). Closes proteus's no-checksum gap (D-004).

split.description: How the train/test split is defined (e.g. 'by qid, disjoint files').

n_justification.description: Why this many seeds (power analysis). Required at confirmatory+.

prereg_hash.description: sha256 of prereg.lock {primary_metric, splits, analysis_plan} + ISO timestamp. Required at confirmatory+.

quicklook.description: The single inspectable signal Task 1 must produce (analog of order-66 demo). One of:

signal_confirmed.description: The FROZEN pilot gate (CONVENTIONS §2): the pre-set threshold a positive must clear before scaling to confirmatory spend. results-verifier reads it as a fixed value, never a post-hoc bar. Distinct from triage's coarse Signal-validated routing heuristic.

baseline.description: The random/chance or baseline value the metric must beat.

host_config.description: Path to host-config.json (gitignored; references creds via env, never inline).

budget.description: Hard cap for autonomous-within-budget tree search (D-003). /execute halts at the cap.

approved.description: Named sign-off at the GO/PIVOT/KILL milestone gate.

fixture.description: true marks a synthetic/example experiment (e.g. the acceptance test), excluded from real findings.
